## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between FOSSA and GrowthX teams to discuss programmatic SEO updates and ongoing projects.](https://fathom.video/share/Ky8Kt_cy7DF8oyZ-xvhXMEW1dsfxss51?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Programmatic SEO for end-of-life content to be integrated into FOSSA Registry pages](https://fathom.video/share/Ky8Kt_cy7DF8oyZ-xvhXMEW1dsfxss51?tab=summary&timestamp=101.0)
  - [New structure proposed: core package page with separate tabs/URLs for security and version history](https://fathom.video/share/Ky8Kt_cy7DF8oyZ-xvhXMEW1dsfxss51?tab=summary&timestamp=858.0)
  - [Redirect chain issues persist; further investigation needed](https://fathom.video/share/Ky8Kt_cy7DF8oyZ-xvhXMEW1dsfxss51?tab=summary&timestamp=311.0)
  - [CMS implementation being considered to streamline content publishing process](https://fathom.video/share/Ky8Kt_cy7DF8oyZ-xvhXMEW1dsfxss51?tab=summary&timestamp=234.0)

## Topics

### Content Publishing Challenges

  - [All SEO content pieces ready for review](https://fathom.video/share/Ky8Kt_cy7DF8oyZ-xvhXMEW1dsfxss51?tab=summary&timestamp=116.0)
  - [Publishing on FOSSA site challenging without CMS](https://fathom.video/share/Ky8Kt_cy7DF8oyZ-xvhXMEW1dsfxss51?tab=summary&timestamp=138.0)
  - [Considering temporary blog post solution with later migration](https://fathom.video/share/Ky8Kt_cy7DF8oyZ-xvhXMEW1dsfxss51?tab=summary&timestamp=167.0)
  - [CMS implementation could save time long-term; headless CMS recommended](https://fathom.video/share/Ky8Kt_cy7DF8oyZ-xvhXMEW1dsfxss51?tab=summary&timestamp=251.0)

### Redirect Chain Issues

  - [Recent audit still shows redirect problems](https://fathom.video/share/Ky8Kt_cy7DF8oyZ-xvhXMEW1dsfxss51?tab=summary&timestamp=311.0)
  - [Manual audit initiated; results pending](https://fathom.video/share/Ky8Kt_cy7DF8oyZ-xvhXMEW1dsfxss51?tab=summary&timestamp=320.0)
  - [Jakub to prioritize investigation and leverage GrowthX team for technical support](https://fathom.video/share/Ky8Kt_cy7DF8oyZ-xvhXMEW1dsfxss51?tab=summary&timestamp=335.0)

### Programmatic SEO for End-of-Life Content

  - [Analyzed endoflife.date as competitor (375,000 monthly visits)](https://fathom.video/share/Ky8Kt_cy7DF8oyZ-xvhXMEW1dsfxss51?tab=summary&timestamp=626.0)
  - [Proposed outline for FOSSA's end-of-life content created](https://fathom.video/share/Ky8Kt_cy7DF8oyZ-xvhXMEW1dsfxss51?tab=summary&timestamp=507.0)
  - [Discussion on integrating end-of-life data into Registry pages vs. standalone property](https://fathom.video/share/Ky8Kt_cy7DF8oyZ-xvhXMEW1dsfxss51?tab=summary&timestamp=436.0)
  - [Decided on core Registry page with separate tabs/URLs for security and version history](https://fathom.video/share/Ky8Kt_cy7DF8oyZ-xvhXMEW1dsfxss51?tab=summary&timestamp=858.0)

### Registry Page Structure

  - [Core page with package information](https://fathom.video/share/Ky8Kt_cy7DF8oyZ-xvhXMEW1dsfxss51?tab=summary&timestamp=664.0)
  - [Security tab (separate URL) for vulnerabilities](https://fathom.video/share/Ky8Kt_cy7DF8oyZ-xvhXMEW1dsfxss51?tab=summary&timestamp=1082.0)
  - [Version history tab (separate URL) for end-of-life information](https://fathom.video/share/Ky8Kt_cy7DF8oyZ-xvhXMEW1dsfxss51?tab=summary&timestamp=407.0)
  - [Approach aims to target specific keywords while maintaining user experience](https://fathom.video/share/Ky8Kt_cy7DF8oyZ-xvhXMEW1dsfxss51?tab=summary&timestamp=858.0)

### Registry Indexing and Sitemap Issues

  - [Uncertainty about individual package page indexing](https://fathom.video/share/Ky8Kt_cy7DF8oyZ-xvhXMEW1dsfxss51?tab=summary&timestamp=1300.0)
  - [Main Registry page is indexed](https://fathom.video/share/Ky8Kt_cy7DF8oyZ-xvhXMEW1dsfxss51?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)
  - [Sitemap submission issues reported; further investigation needed](https://fathom.video/share/Ky8Kt_cy7DF8oyZ-xvhXMEW1dsfxss51?tab=summary&timestamp=1426.0)

### New Redirect Issues

  - [SEMrush report shows new redirect chains](https://fathom.video/share/Ky8Kt_cy7DF8oyZ-xvhXMEW1dsfxss51?tab=summary&timestamp=1531.0)
  - [Many related to package observer and blog tags](https://fathom.video/share/Ky8Kt_cy7DF8oyZ-xvhXMEW1dsfxss51?tab=summary&timestamp=1696.0)
  - [Potential UTM parameter formatting causing redirects](https://fathom.video/share/Ky8Kt_cy7DF8oyZ-xvhXMEW1dsfxss51?tab=summary&timestamp=1718.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Jakub to investigate and diagnose redirect chain issues](https://fathom.video/share/Ky8Kt_cy7DF8oyZ-xvhXMEW1dsfxss51?tab=summary&timestamp=1744.0)
  - [Jakub to create updated version history/end-of-life outline for Registry pages](https://fathom.video/share/Ky8Kt_cy7DF8oyZ-xvhXMEW1dsfxss51?tab=summary&timestamp=1786.0)
  - [Andy to work on publishing CWE series content](https://fathom.video/share/Ky8Kt_cy7DF8oyZ-xvhXMEW1dsfxss51?tab=summary&timestamp=1522.0)
  - [Andy to gather more concrete details and steps for Registry updates](https://fathom.video/share/Ky8Kt_cy7DF8oyZ-xvhXMEW1dsfxss51?tab=summary&timestamp=1558.0)
  - [Internal FOSSA discussion needed on Registry progress and subdomain vs. subfolder structure](https://fathom.video/share/Ky8Kt_cy7DF8oyZ-xvhXMEW1dsfxss51?tab=summary&timestamp=1362.0)
  - [Continue monitoring and resolving sitemap submission issues](https://fathom.video/share/Ky8Kt_cy7DF8oyZ-xvhXMEW1dsfxss51?tab=summary&timestamp=1446.0)
